svg.title: Creator-economy payment concentration by percentile (global, 2025)
svg.desc: Creator-economy payment concentration by percentile (global, 2025). Source: CreatorIQ State of Creator Compensation 2026. Global data, not India-specific. Derived from reported top-1% (21%) and top-10% (62%) shares. Actual distribution within the bottom 90% is illustrative.
